Non-Binding Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Conditional Tender Offer under FIEA — between Hoshizora Kogyo KK and Seifu Capital Partners GK
Issuer: Hoshizora Kogyo Kabushiki Kaisha (fictional), Corporate Number (Hōjin Bangō): 0000000000000 (example only)
Registered Office: 1-2-3 Kurohana-dori, Minami-Hoshimi Ward, Sazanami Prefecture 000-0000, Japan (fictional)
Issuer contact (IR role mailbox): ir@hoshizora-kogyo.co.jp; public helpline (fictional): 0120-000-999
Listing venue: Kanto Digital Securities Exchange (KDSE, fictional); disclosures to be made via KDSE Timely Disclosure network under FIEA
Transaction: Proposed subscription for new shares and potential tender offer to reach a strategic threshold, subject to board approval and employee consultation
Public status: The intention to explore a TOB was publicly announced on 2025-04-01 via KDSE; this term sheet does not contain undisclosed enumerated material facts
Conditions precedent: Board of Directors resolutions, Special Committee review, and confirmation of no violation of APPI regarding employee data processing
Diligence scope: Buyer access limited to aggregated employee data; no transfer of individual codes except as permitted; placeholder fields such as [Employee Name] and [Address] to remain blank
HR reliance example (do not populate in final): Individual Number (My Number) 123456789012 (illustrative, invalid check digit); Passport No. TR0000000 (example, invalid)
Settlement mechanics: Escrow arrangement to be appointed; settlement account placeholder: Bank Code 9999, Branch 000, Account 0000000, Account Name: [Escrow Agent KK] (example only)
Tax and filings: Local Tax Office code 99-9999 (format sample); consumption tax not applicable to share issuance; notifications per FIEA and Companies Act
Shareholding disclosures: Large Shareholding Report threshold (5% Rule) filings to the Securities Monitoring Office (fictional) within statutory timelines
Representations: Each party represents no reliance on non-public information; role-only titles (e.g., Representative Director, Audit & Supervisory Committee Member) to execute on behalf of entities
Communications: KDSE inquiries (fictional public helpline) 0120-111-222; no solicitation to employees via personal phones or emails; use role mailboxes only
Governing law and forum: Japan; disputes to be submitted to East Tokyo Summary Court (fictional); this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity, and governing law provisions
